mapper.sql: select ticket_id, terminal, target_subject_id, target_subject_no, target_account_id, target_user_name, acting_admin_id, acting_admin_name, reason, token_hash, expire_time, used_time, used_ip, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from portal_direct_login_ticket
mapper.update: update portal_direct_login_ticket set status = 'USED', used_time = #{usedTime}, used_ip = #{usedIp}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where ticket_id = #{ticketId} and status = 'ISSUED' and used_time is null and expire_time >= #{usedTime}
update portal_direct_login_ticket set status = 'EXPIRED', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where ticket_id = #{ticketId} and status = 'ISSUED'
